Description: Full-service Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 334 (AL-67, Priceville/Decatur). Open 24 hours with diesel lanes, 8 showers, laundry, Subway and Wendy's, DEF, Wi-Fi and an on-site CAT Scale. Listed with roughly 90 truck parking spaces (about 15 reserved, 15 paid).

Athens tire and wrecker service offering 24/7 tire repair and heavy-duty towing, near I-65 Exit 351 (US-72). Fixed shop with mobile/road service.
